user_query:
I'm a finance undergrad preparing a semester project plan for our corporate finance case. Please help me clean up and structure my plan and consolidate the timeline from my local resources.

Inputs are in the input/ folder. Please:
1) Extract milestones from both input/deliverables.csv and input/research_notes.html, deduplicate by exact title+date, and write a unified JSON to output/milestones.json with an array of objects using these fields:
   - title: string
   - date: string in ISO format YYYY-MM-DD
   - source: 'csv' or 'html' (if a milestone appears in both sources, keep one entry; source can be either but must be one of those two values)
   Extraction rules:
   - From CSV: use the 'deliverable' column as title and 'due_date' as date.
   - From HTML: only consider <li> items inside <ul id="milestones">; get the date from either a data-date attribute or a (YYYY-MM-DD) parenthetical in the text; use the remaining text as the title (trimmed).

2) Rewrite input/draft_project_plan.md into output/project_plan.md:
   - Reorganize it into exactly these four top-level sections with headings as shown: "# Objectives", "# Data Sources", "# Tasks & Timeline", "# Risks & Assumptions".
   - In "# Tasks & Timeline", include a bullet list covering every milestone from output/milestones.json (title and date). Put them in chronological order.
   - Remove TODO markers and obvious clutter, fix grammar, and keep the overall plan concise (aim for no more than ~400 words).

3) Run the validation command: python tests/validate_outputs.py
   - The command should exit with status 0. If it fails, adjust your outputs until it passes.

Deliverables to produce:
- output/milestones.json (the consolidated milestones)
- output/project_plan.md (the cleaned, structured plan that incorporates the milestones)

Do not change the files under input/ or tests/. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
